hero.title: History of Nahavand
hero.subtitle: A journey through the ancient history of this land from antiquity to today

introduction.title: Nahavand Through History
introduction.content: Nahavand is a city with a glorious and honorable history that has witnessed major historical events for more than 2,500 years. From the Achaemenid era to today, this city has always been one of the important cultural, political, and economic centers of Iran.

timeline.title: Nahavand Historical Timeline
timeline.subtitle: An overview of the various historical periods of this ancient city

period1.title: Ancient Era (Pre-Islamic)
period1.event1: Achaemenid rule and the Ganjnameh inscription carved by Darius and Xerxes
period1.event3: Nahavand as one of the important centers of ancient Iran
period1.event4: The Battle of Nahavand in 21 AH

period2.title: Early Islamic Period
period2.event3: Growth of Islamic science and culture
period2.event4: Construction of important mosques and schools

period3.title: Seljuk and Mongol Period
period3.event3: Reconstruction and revival of the city

period4.title: Safavid to Qajar Era
period4.event1: Growth of the pottery industry in Lalejin
period4.event4: Strengthening the cultural identity of the region

period5.title: Modern Era
period5.event2: Preservation and restoration of historical monuments

sites.title: Important Historical Sites
sites.subtitle: Buildings and locations that narrate the history of Nahavand

site1.name: Nahavand Ganjnameh
site1.description: Stone inscriptions of Darius and Xerxes
site1.significance: One of the most important Achaemenid monuments in Iran

site2.name: Nahavand Castle
site2.description: Remains of the ancient castle of the city
site2.significance: A witness to the important Battle of Nahavand

site3.name: Nahavand Grand Mosque
site3.description: One of the oldest mosques in the region
site3.significance: An example of early Islamic architecture

site4.name: Lalejin Pottery Workshops
site4.description: Center of pottery and ceramic production
site4.significance: A living heritage of Iranian handicrafts

battle.title: Battle of Nahavand
battle.description: The Battle of Nahavand in 21 AH (642 AD) is considered one of the most important battles in the history of Iran and Islam. Known as the 'Conquest of Conquests', this battle marked the end of the Sassanid Empire and the beginning of the Islamic era in Iran.
battle.outcome: Outcome: Victory of Muslims and the conquest of Iran

modern.title: Nahavand Today
modern.content: Today, Nahavand is a modern city that, while preserving its historical identity, is moving towards development and progress. Lalejin handicrafts, tourism, and agriculture are among the most important economic sectors of this city.

heritage.title: Our Cultural Heritage
heritage.description: Nahavand's culture is a beautiful blend of ancient Iranian traditions and local influences. From unique handicrafts to captivating music and delicious food, all signify the richness of this ancient land. We are proud to be heirs to such a valuable heritage.

cta.title: Experience Authentic Nahavand Culture
cta.description: Join us to experience firsthand the rich culture and beautiful traditions of Nahavand

hero.title: About Nahavand Tour
hero.description: We are committed to introducing the unique beauty and attractions of the historic city of Nahavand.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To promote Nahavand's tourism attractions and provide the best travel services to visitors and enthusiasts of Iranian history and culture.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Respect for cultural heritage, quality service delivery, environmental preservation, and creating unforgettable experiences for travelers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the primary resource for Nahavand tourism information and contribute to sustainable tourism growth in this historic region.

aboutNahavand.title: Why Nahavand?
aboutNahavand.p1: Nahavand is a city with an ancient history and rich culture, located in Hamadan province. It is recognized as one of the important centers of ancient Iranian civilization.
aboutNahavand.p2: From the treasures of Darius and Xerxes to the unique handicrafts, Nahavand is a treasury of Iranian history, art, and culture.
aboutNahavand.p3: At Nahavand Tour, we are dedicated to showcasing these beauties and creating an unforgettable experience for you.
